REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,DEFENDANTS STEFAN ADLER AND JENNIFER ROSDAIL'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. CAUSES OF ACTION SUBJECT TO THIS MOTION HAVE BEEN RELEASED IN A VALID BINDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITIES ON POINT FOR THE ARGUMENTS MADE REGARDING THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BEING NULL AND VOID (UNLAWFUL OBJECT, HABITABILITY, FRAUD). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT STEFAN ADLER, JENNIFER ROSDAIL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT STEFAN ADLER, JENNIFER ROSDAIL Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED. Moving party failed to establish compliance with CCP 128.5(f)(1). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs STEFAN ADLER and JENNIFER ROSDAIL's Motion For Judgment On Pleadings is GRANTED. Causes of action subject to this motion have been released in a valid binding settlement agreement. Plaintiff cites no authorities on point for the arguments made regarding the Settlement Agreement being null and void (unlawful object, habitability, fraud).
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
